title: January 18th, 2022
body:
lyrics

said it all before, i'll say it all again
never met a four i wouldn't call a ten
that's more than double meaning
life's too rich to have trouble dreaming
awake or sleeping
if that's what it takes i'm leaning
until i can't take the feeling
often punnish myself
try not to hurt people
mind way i say so my words don't serve evil
say what i mind cuz there's more than survival
dunno what you heard
i'm not at war with your bible
that's absurd, it's a book
look, i like anal...oh geez
if asshole's windows to souls
i hope i can see what the pain'll show me
no please, don't leave
until i learned to breathe, be, i won't speak
if you knew me, you don't know me
until i learned to love i was lonely
this ain't the new me cuz there's no me
every word i use somebody loaned me
so when i do me i try to act right
so you can see what it seems to me like

how can you look at something and say what it is
when you know what it is to be in it and looked at
there's limits to our vision by definition
cuz we're always trying to focus on something specific
in the whole of existence and go get it

 lyrics

i stopped thinking i rhyme along time ago
started rapping out loud for the echo
it's hard to let go without practice
fact is this act is too precious
i'm a smash it
expression shatter the exo
expose the endo
end over end so i keep recalibrating my outgoing
slowing the flowing
oxbowing
turning back in
i wait briefly, breathe deeply, turn over then back in
i'm a man of action
actually an action figure
pose suppose prose
i rappin a caption to capture the picture i'm sittin for
but what i'm bullshittin for
my deck is a full fifty four
and the deal is real is a figment of
your lacking imagination
so please tell me what you're having, i'm waiting
i'm playing, i'm hating, i'm acting ungrateful
i made it
got a seat at the table
eatin a plateful
spittin up food for thought cuz i feel playful

 lyrics

i'm god as a lyricist
ok mc but i'm learning it really quick
this my warm up then my victory lap
in between i black out and i never look back
sixteen bars is a lot, i stopped counting at one
kill em all, i can't remember what happened before
kill em all, they won't matter tomorrow
cuz after today there is no wackness allowed in any track i put out
murder my mistakes cuz that shit tastes foul
merc all mixtapes in a big way now
since i decided to let my dick hang out
cuz i ain't never met an artist who could keep it in
breathe out, breathe in is the seqencing
to unlock the box you keep your secrets in
unpop the cork and let the truth flow out
i'll go first to prove i'm down
i've been afraid to rap for twenty five years now
it was thirteen when i wrote this down
